[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001100000 2
1 100010100 3
2 100000000 1
3 100000000 1
4 100000010 2
5 100010000 2
6 100100001 3
7 001100000 2

01 10 100000000 1 match 2 3
12 21 100000000 1 match 2 3
23 32 100000010 2 match 4

45 54 100100001 3 match 6
56 65 001100000 2 match 0 7
67 76 000000000 a
70 07 100000000 1 match 2 3

13 31 101000000 2

35 53 101000000 2

61 16 001000000 1

26 62 000100000 1
37 73 100000000 1 match 2 3
